EmailTemplates.InvitationSubject: Ocufii – Invitation to Join Family Safety Network
EmailTemplates.InvitationBodyWithLocation:
Dear {recipientName},

You have been invited by {senderName} to join their Family Safety Network.

By accepting this invitation, you will be able to:

  • Receive safety alerts from {senderName}
  • Send safety alerts to {senderName}
  • See each other's location during emergencies

To accept this invitation, please follow these steps:

  1. Download the NotifyMe App (if you haven't already).
  2. Enter the following 6-digit code in the app:

{code}

If you have any questions, contact us at support@ocufii.com.

Sincerely,
The Ocufii Team
